# Public Pulse Agency — Full Content for AI ingestion

Last updated: 2026-05-24
Source: https://publicpulse.com.bd

---

## About

Public Pulse Agency is Bangladesh's leading 360° digital marketing and political PR agency, based in Dhaka. Founded in 2024, the agency serves 50+ active clients across 10+ industries with nine integrated services. Average client engagement growth is 300%+ within the first 90 days. The agency is a registered business entity (BIN: 009043032-0102, Trade License: TRAD/DNCC/037136/2025) and is a sister concern within Pulse Group, alongside Event Pulse, Tender Pulse, Social Pulse, and The Pulse Today.

Contact: +880 1717-714676 · info@publicpulse.com.bd · https://wa.me/message/TBIM4KYTCFPEI1

---

## Services

### 1. Political PR & Image Building

Public Pulse Agency runs end-to-end political PR campaigns for Bangladeshi candidates and parties — candidate image building, narrative engineering, opposition research, crisis communication, and a five-phase election execution from pre-campaign positioning to post-election PR. Based in Dhaka, serving constituencies nationwide.

What's included: candidate personal branding (photo, video, biography, public service documentation); constituency opinion surveys and local-hero narrative mapping; rival/opposition analysis and counter-narrative playbooks; five-phase election PR (pre-campaign → mobilization → peak → polling day → post-election); crisis communication retainer with 24-hour response SLA; debunking, fact-checking, and proactive media outreach.

Process: Initial consultation → research & strategy → production & launch → monitor & optimize → report & scale.

### 2. Social Media Management

Facebook, Instagram, YouTube, TikTok — full platform management.

### 3. Content Production

Video, photo, motion graphics, drone shoots — strategy-driven content.

### 4. Paid Ads & Campaigns

Meta, Google, YouTube — maximum ROI at minimum cost.

### 5. Hospitality Marketing

Resorts, restaurants, hotels — from Cox's Bazar to Sylhet.

### 6. Brand Building & Design

Logo, identity, packaging — make your brand unforgettable.

### 7. SEO & Website Development

Rank #1 on Google. Professional websites that convert.

### 8. Analytics & Performance Reporting

Data dashboards, ROI tracking, actionable insights.

### 9. Influencer & KOL Marketing

Micro to mega influencers — authentic campaigns that convert.

---

## Featured article

### Digital Marketing in Bangladesh 2026: The Complete Guide

Published 2026-04-13 · 12 min read

Digital marketing in Bangladesh in 2026 means competing for 66 million social media users and 130 million mobile internet subscribers across Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and Google. The winning playbook combines short-form video at the top of funnel, Meta + Google paid ads in the middle, and Google Business Profile plus local SEO at the bottom — measured weekly against revenue, not vanity metrics.

The Bangladesh digital landscape in 2026: Bangladesh crossed 66 million active social media users and 130 million mobile internet subscribers in early 2026, with Facebook still dominant, TikTok growing fastest, and YouTube the most-watched long-form platform. Average smartphone data costs have fallen below ৳1/GB on most operators, making video-heavy content economical to consume.

Why digital marketing is essential: traditional channels still drive awareness, but they cannot be measured, segmented, or pivoted weekly. Digital channels can — the brands winning in 2026 are the ones that ship campaigns weekly, kill what doesn't work in seven days, and double down on what does.

Key 2026 trends: (1) short-form vertical video is the dominant ad format across Meta, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts; (2) AI-assisted content production has compressed the cost of producing 20-second concepts by 5–10x; (3) Google AI Overviews and ChatGPT/Claude/Perplexity browsing are now meaningful sources of inbound traffic.

Strategy: start with the funnel. Top: short-form video and influencer reach. Middle: Meta retargeting and Google Search ads. Bottom: Google Business Profile, local SEO, on-site conversion optimization. Pick one KPI per stage and measure weekly.

First 90 days: Days 1–30: audit existing channels, set up GA4 + Meta Pixel + GTM, ship one piece of weekly content. Days 31–60: launch ৳50,000–৳200,000/month paid campaigns on the top channel, set up Google Business Profile, kick off local SEO. Days 61–90: review the data, kill bottom-quartile creative, double down on the top quartile.

FAQs:
Q: How much does digital marketing cost in Bangladesh in 2026? A: Entry-level paid campaigns start around ৳50,000/month including ad spend; mid-market brands typically allocate ৳200,000–৳500,000/month split across Meta, Google, and influencer. Agency retainers for full management start at ৳75,000/month.
Q: Which channel should a Bangladeshi small business start with? A: For most local businesses, the first channel is Google Business Profile + Facebook page kept actively updated, with a small ৳15,000–৳30,000/month Meta ad budget testing two creatives at a time.
Q: How long until digital marketing shows results? A: Paid ads show signal within 7–14 days; meaningful optimization takes 30–60 days. SEO and content investments take 90–180 days to compound.

---

## Pulse Group

Pulse Group is a family of Bangladesh-focused digital businesses:
- Public Pulse Agency (publicpulse.com.bd) — digital marketing & political PR
- Event Pulse (eventpulse.com.bd) — event management
- Tender Pulse (tenderpulse.com.bd) — government tenders & e-procurement intelligence
- Social Pulse (socialpulse.bd) — community & influencer platform
- The Pulse Today (pulsetoday.com.bd) — daily news for Bangladesh
